description:
In ir_codegen.rs compile_pipeline, replace:

```rust
crate::ir_inline::inline_module(&mut working);
crate::ir_fuse::fuse_blocks(&mut working);
crate::ir_reducer::reduce_module(&mut working);
```

with:

```rust
crate::ir_fuse::fuse_blocks(&mut working);
crate::ir_reducer::reduce_module(&mut working);  // now also writes Inlined outcomes
```

ir_inline::inline_single_use_conts stays — it's a typer-output-driven
optimization, distinct from this arc.

## Acceptance

- Goldens identical (or intentionally re-blessed per E.2 audit).
- All 842 tests green.

## Removes

- The ir_inline::inline_module call from compile_pipeline.
title: fz-CO.E.3 — Pipeline: reducer-with-Inlined replaces ir_inline::inline_module
